title: Matera CEO Thinks US Banks Should Take a Page From Brazil's Success With Pix and QR Code Payments
excerpt: Digital transformation for banks and credit unions in the U.S. is ripe with opportunities, some of which can strengthen customer relationships in ways that only a few years ago would
body:
Digital transformation for banks and credit unions in the U.S. is ripe with opportunities, some of which can strengthen customer relationships in ways that only a few years ago would have been scarcely imaginable. With the help of artificial intelligence (AI), direct connections and instant payments technology is moving banks closer than ever to end customers and merchants.

Carlos Netto, Matera Co-founder and CEO, and John Gaffney, PYMNTS Chief Content Officer, discuss how QR code standards can boost the adoption of the payment method in the U.S. Watch the full discussion on PYMNTS.com [here](https://www.pymnts.com/news/payments-innovation/2024/matera-ceo-thinks-us-banks-should-take-a-page-from-brazils-success-with-pix-and-qr-code-payments/).
